/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/CommandHandlers.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/common.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/config.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/dict.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/engine.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/handleHttp.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/jemalloc.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/kvstr.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/list.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/persistloader.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/protocolhandler.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/robject.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/server.cc.o CMakeFiles/RingKV.dir/zset.cc.o -o ../bin/RingKV  ../lib/libAeroIO_net.a ../lib/libAeroIO_Http.a -luring -ljemalloc -lhiredis -ljemalloc ../lib/libAeroIO_net.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjemalloc.so -lhiredis
